text: Homepage wireframes approved. Moving into high-fidelity mockups this week. On track for April 15 milestone.
User auth migration complete but projects endpoint migration is behind schedule. Need to reassess timeline for remaining endpoints.
Content calendar finalized. Blog post series planned. Social templates in review with design team.
CI/CD pipeline green on both platforms. Login screen implementation started. Beta test recruitment at 35/50.
Button component shipped but color tokens need revision after accessibility audit. Falling behind on documentation.
Sprint 1 tasks all assigned. Velocity looking good. Planning Sprint 2 next week.
Navigation component coded and responsive. Hero section mockup approved by stakeholders.
Rate limiting implementation more complex than expected. Pushing back non-critical endpoints to next sprint.
